globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.azurecontainerapps.io https://challenges.cloudflare.com; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
